name: Carla Esparza

qualityWinLedger.context: Future champion in inaugural title context.

primeWindowDetail.endReason: Joanna did not permanently close window because Esparza rebuilt to win title again. Zhang closes it.

lossContextEvents.context: Esparza eventually rebuilt into a second UFC title reign.
Esparza rebuilt through the later contender run.
The later title-winning run kept the canonical window connected.
Esparza recovered with the Grasso-through-Rose II title run.
Retirement fight after the Zhang endpoint.

shortCase: Esparza is the awkward two-time champion case: beat Rose twice, won the inaugural belt, regained it years later.
bestArgument: She beat Rose twice and won UFC gold twice.
counterArgument: The counter is dominance: no defenses and ugly title losses.
whyRankedHere: Esparza scores as a real UFC champion because two UFC title wins matter and the second-title climb had real ranked names.
whyNotHigher: She does not rank higher because she never defended either belt, had two damaging title losses, and rarely separated from elite opponents in a dominant way.
finalTakeaway: Esparza is not fun to rank, but she is a required UFC-only women’s champion add.
